narrative:
Liberty (precinct in Washington County) has 287 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
